title: amesia consimilis
side_effects: Amesia consimilis can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its potent neurotoxins. Prolonged exposure to its active compounds can also cause respiratory problems, including coughing and shortness of breath. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can lead to memory loss and cognitive impairment, which may be irreversible. Additionally, it may interact with other medications, increasing the risk of adverse reactions and complications.
